query:
SELECT subject, status, COUNT(*) AS n
FROM curriculumTopics
GROUP BY subject, status
ORDER BY subject, status;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT subject, status, COUNT(*) AS n
FROM curriculumTopics
GROUP BY subject, status
ORDER BY subject, status;
